mapper.select: select id, campus_location, manager_name, manager_phone, created_at, updated_at from sys_campus where id = #{id}
select id, campus_location, manager_name, manager_phone, created_at, updated_at from sys_campus where campus_location = #{campusLocation}

select id, campus_location, manager_name, manager_phone, created_at, updated_at from sys_campus
and (campus_location like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or manager_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or manager_phone like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into sys_campus (campus_location, manager_name, manager_phone, created_at, updated_at) values (#{campusLocation}, #{managerName}, #{managerPhone}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update sys_campus set campus_location = #{campusLocation}, manager_name = #{managerName}, manager_phone = #{managerPhone}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from sys_campus where id = #{campusId}
